text:
Once upon a time there was a young fox who was orphaned when his family was poisoned by greed. Orphaned though he was, his spirit remained full of dreams.

Every night he would talk to the moon about his dreams, hoping it might approve. One night something unusual happened—he felt an odd warmth radiating from the moon.

Come dawn...

The next morning, to his absolute astonishment, he was no longer alone. Standing guard beside him was an enchanted talking owl.

The owl listened to Fox's dreams bravely.

One night you could hear his dreams speak.

You wanted something sweet.

You wanted poison.

You wanted your family.

Fox thought hard.

He wanted to protect his family.

That should be enough to dream.

The owl turned towards the moon.

"You speak truth," it crowed. Something miraculous happened.

The moonbeam softened.

You shall come.

That night, with guardian owl beside him, Fox sought out poison—a thing he had never done.

Instead, they hunted
